summary: Phase 4 Mobile Responsiveness + PWA - Testing MobileBottomNav component, responsive layouts, and PWA manifest/service worker

features_tested.feature: Site Engineer mobile bottom nav (390x844 viewport)
features_tested.notes: Bottom nav shows 4 items: Projects, Receipt, Alerts, Profile. All visible and functional.
Clicking Receipt nav item navigates to /site-engineer/material-receipt

features_tested.feature: Desktop GM view (1920x800) - bottom nav hidden
features_tested.notes: Bottom nav element exists but is hidden on md+ breakpoint (correct behavior)

features_tested.feature: Material Receipt page mobile bottom nav
features_tested.notes: Shows SE-specific nav items, Receipt is highlighted when active
Returns 200 with proper PWA config: name=ConstructionOS, display=standalone, theme_color=#2563EB
Returns 200, network-first strategy, skips API calls correctly
More button visible, clicking opens sidebar overlay with close button
Documents tab visible and working with upload zone

minor.issue: Console shows 404/403 errors for some resources on GM dashboard (non-blocking)

critical_code_review_comments: MobileBottomNav.jsx properly implements role-based nav config for 8 different user roles
Bottom nav uses md:hidden class correctly to hide on desktop (md breakpoint = 768px)
Safe area padding for iOS notch implemented via safe-area-inset-bottom
Sidebar overlay opens correctly from More button with proper z-index layering
PWA manifest properly configured with maskable icons
Service worker correctly skips /api/ calls (network only for API)
data-testid attributes properly set for all nav items enabling automated testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 PWA features all working. MobileBottomNav shows role-based navigation items. Site engineer gets 4 items (Projects, Receipt, Alerts, Profile), GM/Admin gets 4 items with 'More' button that opens sidebar overlay. Bottom nav hidden on desktop (md+). PWA manifest and service worker properly configured for offline support. All 9 pages with MobileBottomNav integration tested and working.
